cuisine_type: 宁波菜 / 甬帮菜 (creative high-end)
neighborhood: 北外滩 / Raffles City Beibund top three floors
address: Raffles City Beibund (北外滩来福士) top three floors, Hongkou
head_chef: 翁拥军 (Weng Yongjun — Yong Fu Group founder, nearly 40 years culinary experience)
restaurant_group: 甬府 / Yong Fu Group (founded 2011; also operates 明路川 and LES NUAGES brands)
signature_dishes: 酸汤梅鱼烩花胶 (sour-soup yellowfin with fish maw)
鲍鱼配宁波豆瓣酱 (abalone with Ningbo fermented bean sauce — the signature reinterpretation)
vibe_and_space: Three-floor sky-lounge format on top of Raffles Beibund with Huangpu panorama. Investment reportedly in nine figures (CNY). Premium hardware on every detail — service register comparable to Mandarin Oriental tier. Weng's stated brief was 'a Chinese restaurant that out-luxes the five-star hotel Chinese restaurants.'
one_paragraph_recommendation: The 2026 Black Pearl 三钻 ascent for Yong Fu (Beibund flagship) is the year's clearest example of regional 中餐 climbing to the very top tier — Weng Yongjun explicitly built Beibund to outperform hotel-Chinese-restaurants on hardware and ingredient sourcing while keeping Ningbo's 咸鲜合一 backbone. The abalone-with-Ningbo-fermented-bean-paste reinterpretation has been singled out by the 'abalone prince' Ma Guangfan as the kind of dish 五星 hotel Cantonese kitchens were not producing. Recommend for a major business or special-occasion dinner with a Ningbo / 江浙 client; for a relaxed taste of the brand without the price, go to the Hongkou or Jinjiang branches instead. Distinct from the existing `yong-fu-hongkou` record — that's the original neighborhood branch; this is the 2024+ tower flagship.
